paper.title: GrowLoop: Self-Evolving Conversation Evaluation Seeded by Human

official_release.relationship_evidence: The repository README has the exact paper title, authors, arXiv identifier 2605.28882, abstract-level method description, results claims, and citation. It identifies itself as the GrowLoop paper repository and explicitly says no code or data is released.
official_release.release_timing_note: The pinned commit postdates arXiv v2 by nearly thirteen days and must not be treated as the exact paper-time repository state. The repository was created on 2026-05-28, after the original arXiv publication and before v2.
official_release.readme_license_statement: The paper PDF is released for research use only. No code or data is being released with this repository at this time.

present: the exact immutable arXiv v2 PDF
not_found_in_acquired_tree: annotator recruitment, labeling, or adjudication records
judge prompts or raw judge outputs
experiment outputs, bootstrap samples, or statistical analysis artifacts
release_inventory_observation.scope_note: Absence is an acquisition-time inventory of the exact untruncated 15-blob tree at the pinned commit, not proof that artifacts never existed elsewhere. The README itself states that no code or data is released. A reviewer should still inspect the paper for any additional author-owned artifact links.

verification.withdrawal_check: The immutable arXiv v2 API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
verification.pdf_check: pdfinfo parsed an unencrypted 37-page PDF; pdftotext produced non-empty text spanning the abstract, methods, experiments, references, appendices, ablations, and case studies.
verification.release_check: The downloaded zip passed unzip integrity testing. Its 15 extracted files total 13,769,654 bytes, exactly matching the sum of blob sizes in the non-truncated recursive Git tree. The repository PDF is byte-identical to the acquired immutable arXiv v2 PDF.
verification.review_boundary: Acquisition and extraction only. This manifest does not claim a deep methodological review or validate any paper result.
